description.ko: 중력을 왜곡하는 특이점 중심에서의 우주적 공포와 무한한 정적에 대한 장엄한 묘사.
description.en: A majestic depiction of cosmic horror and infinite silence at the center of a gravity-warping singularity.

prompt: A cinematic 8k render of VOID-3, titled 'The Event Horizon's Sigh.' A massive swirling vortex of #0D0221 obsidian dark matter and #3D1A78 deep violet energy at the universe's core. Gossamer-thin #7B68EE lavender nebula tendrils are pulled into a gravitational singularity, creating a lens-warping effect. Distant #E6E6FA soft lavender star clusters flicker through dense cosmic dust. Volumetric lighting, infinite scale.
